pi_items.source: Task specification matches standard LED resistor circuit design; mathematically verified
Typical LED forward voltage; matches standard design specifications
Standard LED operating current (20 mA); matches industrial LED specifications
Mathematically verified: R = (V_source - V_led) / I_led = (24 - 3.2) / 0.02 = 1040 Ohms
Path specification consistent with environment mount configuration and task requirements

privileged_info_summary: The LED resistor calculation task uses mathematically correct input values (24V source voltage, 3.2V LED forward voltage, 20mA LED current) that produce a verified series resistance of 1040 Ohms and power dissipation of 0.416W. These values follow standard industrial LED circuit design principles and are consistent across all metadata fields. The Electrical Calculations app (com.hsn.electricalcalculations) is a real Android application available on Google Play with 100K+ downloads and a 4.28/5 star rating. The task data is synthetic—created as a test scenario within an Android emulation environment with tasks designed to validate agent ability to use the app's calculation features.
